data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Kick Off Week In Green On Options-Expiry Relief Rally
data.description: Bitcoin's value has increased by approximately 1.5% to $67,367.79 after reaching a low of $65,000 over the weekend. A relief rally from options expiry and a broader market rebound contributed to this upturn. Within the last 24 hours, liquidations in the cryptocurrency market amounted to $366.35 million. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a total outflow of $225.5 million, while Ethereum ETFs reported $48.5 million in net outflows on Friday. Other crypto assets include Ethereum at $2,049.82, Solana at $83.71, XRP at $1.34, Dogecoin at $0.09230, and Shiba Inu at $0.00056003. The overall market capitalization of meme coins increased by 1.4%. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Penny Stock Scienture Reports Revenue Surge, Expanding Market Access In 2025
data.description: Scienture Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SCNX) announced a significant boost in their fourth-quarter performance, with a notable 216% increase in net revenue reaching $431.6 thousand. This surge in revenue can be attributed to the successful market entry of Arbli post its FDA approval and launch in the third quarter of 2025. The company also witnessed a remarkable expansion in gross margin, surging by 7,240 basis points to 76.8%. This surge reflects the strategic shift towards higher-margin branded pharmaceutical sales from the previous lower-margin wholesale activities. Although there was a one-time non-cash impairment charge of $26.3 million, the net loss from continuing operations diminished slightly compared to the previous year. As of the year-end, Scienture possessed approximately $6.7 million in cash and cash equivalents, supported by a positive working capital of about $5.2 million. Throughout the year, Scienture inked various agreements led by pharmacy benefit managers, enhancing formulary positioning and commercial coverage for Arbli.

data.title: Why Are CleanSpark Shares Surging On Monday?
data.description: CleanSpark Inc. (NASDAQ: CLSK) is experiencing significant positive movement in premarket trading on Monday. This uptick aligns with a rebound in the overall cryptocurrency market following a turbulent weekend. The total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies has increased by 1.39% to reach $2.33 trillion as of Monday morning. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has seen a 1.43% rise in the past 24 hours, trading close to $67,367. Nasdaq futures are up by 0.43%, with S&P 500 futures showing a gain of 0.53%. CleanSpark, a company specializing in data center development for bitcoin mining, is known to closely track the performance of the digital asset. Furthermore, data on short interest indicates a limited float.
Earnings Scheduled For March 30, 2026

data.title: CHIPOTLE LAUNCHES BURRITO VAULT: DOUBLE PROTEIN EDITION WITH OVER $2 MILLION IN CHIPOTLE PRIZES FOR NATIONAL BURRITO DAY
data.description: Chipotle's digital game, which garnered over 3.5 million plays in 2025, has returned for its third year with a focus on high protein options. The game, known as Chipotle's Burrito Vault: Double Protein Edition, offers Rewards Members the chance to win prizes such as free burritos for a year, a buy-one-get-one-free entree, and other incentives.

data.title: Mattamy Homes Closes on Land in Pasadena Ridge, Bringing New Home Opportunities to Pasco County, Florida
data.description: On April 18th, Mattamy Homes will commence sales for 21 home designs in Pasadena Ridge, located in Tampa, Florida. This development offers a variety of amenities and is situated in a rapidly expanding area. The acquisition of homesites was finalized on March 26, 2026. Buyers can expect a diverse range of options and a connected community experience.

data.title: Koppers to Ring NYSE Closing Bell to Celebrate 20th Anniversary of Listing; Management Hosting Meetings with the Financial Community in New York
data.description: PITTSBURGH, March 30, 2026 - Koppers Holdings Inc., traded as KOP on the NYSE, a leading company in treated wood products, wood treatment chemicals, and carbon compounds globally, is set to commemorate the 20th year since being listed on the New York Stock Exchange. In celebration, the company will participate in the NYSE Closing event.

data.title: GomSpace Draws EUR 7 Million Under Shareholder Credit Facility to Support Strategy Execution
data.description: GomSpace recently disclosed the utilization of €7 million (approximately SEK 75 million) from the third tranche ("Tranche C") of the shareholder credit facility totaling €18 million. This credit facility was set up with Peter Kendal Hargreaves, GomSpace's principal shareholder. The drawing down of this amount marks a significant step for the company in terms of financial support and capital utilization.

data.title: New Book Explores Healing Through Shadow Integration and Emotional Awareness
data.description: Kaitlin Kesler, a compassionate author, presents a unique approach to shadow work in her latest book "From Shadow Into Light: Heal," released on March 30, 2026. The book delves into the exploration of suppressed emotions, shadow patterns, and repetitive behaviors. Kesler provides guidance on integrating these aspects, offering readers valuable insights.

data.title: PLEOPHARMA, INC. to Present at the Centri Capital Conference in New York
data.description: A company from Phoenixville, Pennsylvania called PleoPharma, Inc., which is dedicated to developing treatments for health problems related to cannabis, revealed that their management team is scheduled to speak at the Centri Capital Conference in New York City on April 14, 2026, at 8:30 a.m.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S - share repurchase programme
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, Novo Nordisk began a share buyback program on February 4, 2026, following regulations established by the European Parliament and Council as well as the EU Safe Harbour Rules. This initiative is a component of an overarching share repurchase plan totaling DKK 15 billion, set to be implemented over a year-long span starting from the aforementioned date.

data.title: Quantum BioPharma Signs Binding Letter Of Intent With Allucent To Conduct Phase 2 Clinical Trial In Multiple Sclerosis
data.description: A significant move has been made in the clinical development of Lucid-21-302, a pioneering treatment for inhibiting demyelination. A strategic partnership has been formed with a global Clinical Research Organization (CRO) to advance the research. This collaboration highlights the commitment to progress in the clinical development of Lucid-21-302, which is a novel first-in-class treatment. This partnership marks a crucial step forward in the journey towards potentially groundbreaking treatments, with Lucid-21-302 showing promise in inhibiting demyelination. This development signifies a new phase in the research, with the partnership set to bolster the clinical progress of Lucid-21-302.
